title: Gradient Mastery
description: Fix the broken gradient backgrounds on a set of banners using linear, radial, and conic gradients
html:
Linear Gradient
Radial Gradient
Conic Gradient

hints.text: CSS has three gradient types: linear (line), radial (circle/ellipse), and conic (angle). Each has different syntax for direction and shape.
Linear needs 'to right' for horizontal. Radial needs 'circle' keyword. The last one should use 'conic-gradient' not 'linear-gradient'.
Fix: linear-gradient(to right, blue, purple), radial-gradient(circle, yellow, orange), conic-gradient(red, orange, yellow, green, blue, purple, red)
